svg.text: Domestic Water Replenishment Controller — ESP32-C6 Based | DAT-WATER-PLC-001 | Rev 0.3 | 2026-07-18
From Mornsun LM50-23B12R2S | Powers: BDD pump, HL-52S relay coil, A02YYUW, YF-S201
From LM2596 buck | Powers: ESP32-C6, WS2812B, aviation LEDs, HL-52S coil
DC arcs do NOT self-extinguish with AC MCBs.
GPIO15 is SPI boot strap — 10kΩ pull-down
ensures safe boot with AO3400A MOSFET gate
Do NOT connect ESP32 until voltage confirmed
Drawing D-05: Unified Electrical + Signal Single-Line Diagram
Supersedes: D-02 v0.2 (Electrical) + D-03 v0.2 (IO Wiring)
Print all 5 drawings (D-01 to D-05) at 300 DPI A3 landscape and staple with DAT-WATER-PLC-001-v0.3-Misha.docx
E-02 Mornsun LM50 12V/4.2A | E-03 LM2596 12V→5V | E-06 HL-52S 5V relay | E-07 AO3400A MOSFET | P-02 BDD 12V pump | ESP32-C6 DevKitC-1 | MCB-04 2A DC-rated
